testcase.name: test_TC_NAVIGATION_003

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/faq/')' Actual value: https://www.scrapethissite.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "https://www.scrapethissite.com/"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py#x1B[0m:31: in test_TC_NAVIGATION_003 #x1B[0mpage.locator(#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33ma.nav-link#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m).nth(#x1B[94m0#x1B[39;49;00m).click()#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/faq/')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: https://www.scrapethissite.com/ #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 10000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 13 × unexpected value "https://www.scrapethissite.com/"#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_ContentVerification_01

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 're.compile('Scrape This Site Sandbox Lessons FAQ Login')' Actual value:
Scrape This Site
Sandbox
Lessons
FAQ
Login
Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#site-nav") 18 × locator resolved to <nav id="site-nav">…</nav> - unexpected value "
Scrape This Site
Sandbox
Lessons
FAQ
Login
"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_2_f871\test_page_2_f871.py#x1B[0m:37: in test_TC_ContentVerification_01 #x1B[0m#x1B[04m#x1B[91m?#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[04m#x1B[91m?#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[04m#x1B[91m?#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 're.compile('Scrape This Site Sandbox Lessons FAQ Login')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Scrape This Site#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Sandbox#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Lessons#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE FAQ#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Login#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_001

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('https:\\/\\/gum\\.co\\/oLpqb')' Actual value: https://gumroad.com/checkout Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 15000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout?action=show&controller=links&format=html&id=oLpqb&price=29700&product=oLpqb&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&rent=false&wanted=true" 12 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout"

testcase.name: test_TC_ContentVerification_001

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'SCRAPE ANY WEBSITE' Actual value: Scrape Any Website Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("#header") 18 × locator resolved to

↵ Scrape Any Website↵ …

- unexpected value " Scrape Any Website "

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_05

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/robots.txt')' Actual value: http://www.scrapethissite.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "http://www.scrapethissite.com/"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_4_2b0a\test_page_4_2b0a.py#x1B[0m:46: in test_TC_Navigation_05 #x1B[0mexpect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(#x1B[33mr#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m/robots.txt#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m), timeout=#x1B[94m10000#x1B[39;49;00m)#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/robots.txt')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: http://www.scrapethissite.com/ #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 10000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 13 × unexpected value "http://www.scrapethissite.com/"#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/pages/')' Actual value: http://www.scrapethissite.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "http://www.scrapethissite.com/"
